name: 50-memories-broad-query
description: User with 50+ memories asks a broad strategic question. Tests ranking and limits.

seedMemories.title: Q1 Revenue Report
seedMemories.content: Q1 revenue was $24K. Growth rate 15% MoM.

seedMemories.title: Competitor analysis
seedMemories.content: Main competitor launched a free tier. Our churn increased 3%.

seedMemories.title: Team morale check
seedMemories.content: Team survey shows 7/10 satisfaction. Main concern: unclear product direction.

seedMemories.title: Investor meeting notes
seedMemories.content: Investors want to see path to $100K MRR by Q4.

seedMemories.title: Product roadmap Q2
seedMemories.content: Planned features: API access, team collaboration, mobile app.

query: What should our top 3 priorities be for Q2?
